title: calendula aegyptiaca var. microcephala
intro: Calendula aegyptiaca var. microcephala is a lesser-known variety of the calendula plant, a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region and Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds, making it useful for wound healing and skin care. The health benefits of Calendula aegyptiaca var. microcephala include soothing and calming irritated skin, reducing inflammation and pain, and promoting the healing of wounds, cuts, and burns. Herbal preparations of Calendula aegyptiaca var. microcephala include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams and ointments, which can be used to treat various skin conditions and promote overall skin health.
